sql.if: AND ( c.post_id IN ( SELECT post_id FROM community WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' UNION ALL SELECT post_id FROM community WHERE CONTAINS(content, '{' || #{keyword} || '}') > 0 ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT c.post_id, c.title, c.created_at, c.comment_count, c.view_count, m.user_id, m.user_name, 0 AS isFavorite FROM community c JOIN member m ON c.user_id = m.user_id
1=1
ORDER BY post_id DESC OFFSET (#{pageNum} -1) * #{amount} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{amount} ROWS ONLY

SELECT c.post_id, c.title, m.user_name, c.comment_count, c.view_count, (c.view_count * 1 + c.comment_count * 5) AS popularity_score FROM community c JOIN member m ON c.user_id = m.user_id WHERE c.created_at >= SYSDATE - 14 ORDER BY popularity_score DESC FETCH FIRST 15 ROWS ONLY

SELECT c.post_id, c.title, c.view_count, c.comment_count, c.created_at FROM community c WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(f UNIQUE_FAVORITE) */ 1 FROM favorite f WHERE f.post_id = c.post_id AND f.user_id = #{user_id} AND f.board_type = 'COM' ) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.post_id DESC OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{amount} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{amount} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND board_type = 'COM'
